title: alnus sibirica var. hirsuta
intro: Alnus sibirica var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy Siberian alder, is a variety of deciduous tree native to Russia and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting wound healing. Alnus sibirica var. hirsuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
